overview.description: The PGIM Active High Yield Bond ETF (PHYL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of high yield bonds. The fund seeks total return. PHYL was launched on Sep 24, 2018 and is issued by PGIM.
